questions.question: If A is 20% more than B, then B is how much percent less than A?
A can do a work in 12 days and B in 18 days. They work together for 4 days. Fraction of work left?
questions.explanation: Together rate = 1/12+1/18 = 5/36. In 4 days = 20/36 = 5/9 done. Left = 4/9.
